hero.headline: Digital presence that converts.
hero.subheadline: I'm not an agency, and I don't sell templates. I'm a freelance developer who writes real code, builds solid products, and owns the outcome.
hero.techBadges: Next.js · TypeScript · React · Node.js · Tailwind · i18n · AI

whyMe.title: Why me, not an agency?
whyMe.card1Desc: I don't use visual builders. Every project is clean, performant, and scalable code written from scratch.
whyMe.card2Desc: Frontend, backend, databases, APIs, AI. No subcontracting needed — everything stays under one technical standard.
whyMe.card3Desc: You talk to me directly at all times. No account managers, no broken telephone, no late proposals.
whyMe.card4Desc: No office, no idle team. What you pay for is real work — not agency structure and markup.

services.title: Services
services.s1Desc: Presentation pages, portfolios, and lead capture. Custom design, zero templates.
services.s2Desc: Full corporate site: internal pages, team, forms, technical on-page SEO.
services.s3Desc: Conversion-optimized sites: copy structure, CTAs, analytics and ads integration.
services.s4Desc: Real multilingual with next-intl. Locale-based URLs, SEO hreflang, market-adapted content.
services.s5Desc: Smart chatbots, embedded assistants, OpenAI / Anthropic integration. Real automations.
services.s6Desc: REST or tRPC APIs, databases, authentication, third-party integrations. Node.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.footnote: ARS prices are approximate at the current exchange rate. USD prices are fixed.
pricing.customFor: For startups and companies with specific needs

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project. I'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

meta.title: Freelance Web Development — Argentina
meta.description: Digital presence that converts. Freelance web development with Next.js, TypeScript and React. Landing pages, institutional sites, i18n, AI and APIs. Argentina.
